race.description: Three Rivers Machinery Narromine Gold Cup - 23 August Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: TOO DARN LOVELY (2) returns and looks much better suited back to this level. Has posted two first-up wins in the past and has been readied with a sharp trial win on the Illawarra Grange. Draws to advantage and gets an important 3kg claim. Will take some catching from the front. TAORMINA SAILOR (3) also showed good early speed from an outside draw when fresh from a spell last time out and led for much of the way before finding a couple better. Fitter now and is in the mix. BROKEN WINGS (7) returns and boasts a handy fresh record. Gets in light with the 2kg claim and is right in the mix after a stack of scratchings. TORENDOSETTA (10) next.
